title: RPCommands
body:
ENG
Plugin RPCommands adds role commands.
-------------------------------------------
Capabilities;
1. Enable/disable unnecessary commands.
2. Adding your own variant for the /try command.
3. Full customization.
In the config, you can set the team color and radius.
--------------------------------------------
Commands;
1. /me (action) - action 1 person.
2. /gme (global action) - global action 1 person.
3. /try (action) - action successful/unsuccessful.
4. /do (action) - action 3 person - description of the current situation.
5. /coin - toss a coin. (eagle/tail of coin)
6. /whisper (message) - whisper a message.
--------------------------------------------
There is also a Russian version.
